name: Stay on Track: Vacation Reset Bundle
description: Vacations should leave you refreshed—not exhausted, inflamed, and struggling to get back on track. The Stay on Track Vacation Reset Bundle is designed to support energy, recovery, focus, and resilience before, during, and after travel so you can enjoy your trip and return home feeling your best.
indication: Includes NAD+, Wolverine (BPC-157 + TB-500) and L-Theanine which together are ideal for flights, busy travel, jet lag, and return to work. Benefits include support of healthy energy levels, faster recovery from travel and activity, promotion of calm focus and stress resilience, better sleep, and a general feeling of refresh.
